channel.title: Tags/Stability on Create A Van Life
channel.description: Recent content in Tags/Stability on Create A Van Life

item.title: Gear That Improves Van Power Stability (No Wiring Required)
item.description:
This page is about reducing drift without rewiring your rig. The goal is to lower baseline pressure and prevent bad-week spirals before they start.

Start with:

  • Van Power Stability Scorecard
  • Recovery Moves Index

Humidity control (protect electronics + comfort)
#

  • Moisture absorbers (DampRid-style products) in appropriate storage areas.
  • A small hygrometer so you can see humidity trends and adjust habits.
  • Storage habits that keep sensitive gear dry and away from direct damp airflow.

For coastal caution and electronics-risk framing, use:

item.title: Start Here: Recovery-First Van Power Flow
item.description:
Create A Van Life is a recovery-first framework for van power. The goal is to help you stay stable through real conditions, not just ideal days.

We use CAVL as shorthand for Create A Van Life.

If you follow the routing in this page, you can reduce drift, choose better refill moves, and avoid panic upgrades.

item.title: Van Power Stability Scorecard: Quick Self-Audit to Fix the Right Thing First
item.description:
This is a self-audit, not a gear list.

Start here:

  • Van Power Upgrade Decision Tree
  • Tier 2 Bad Week Protocol

How to use this scorecard (30 seconds)
#

Mark each section:
